creator: david@wmol.com
text:
My USB Logitech optical mouse does not function after going to single user mode via "shutdown now", then return'ing.
I have tried restarting usbd, but that does not work.  The only way that I have found to work is
to reboot.

NOTE: I can only test its functionality in X.  I get no cursor in my console when using this mouse (I 
      do have a console cursor in 4.X though)

Fix: 

unknown
How-To-Repeat: 1. Use a Logitech USB optical mouse
2. Boot normally
3. shutdown now
4. return
5. startx
